hotel_name: Studio 6 Extended stay Fairfield, OH - Cincinnati

reviews.title: Don’t Stay Here! It’s for Nefarious Activities
reviews.text: I should have known when the front desk employee appeared from a room with a “non approved” uniform on. A dingy tank top and tiny shorts. The room facility was suppose to be non smoking but it smelled like weed, cigarettes, and old carpet. There were strange men just constantly hanging in the hall. I was honestly concerned if it was a sex trafficking hotel. The room it’s self had cigarette burns on the furniture. We prepaid for 2 nights but just left. I didn’t feel like someone was going to hurt but I thought the FBI is going raid this spot at any moment. Don’t stay here.

reviews.title: Do NOT BOOK this hotel! You will very disappointed.
reviews.positives: What is on the picture it’s not what they are offering! Not only do they do not advertise that there’s a time limit to be there. The lady lied, she mentioned until 9pm when calling booking they say a client can go to property before midnight .
reviews.negatives:
The staff was very discriminating. Lady front desk Heidi was very rude!
Do NOT BOOK this hotel! You will very disappointed.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
I'm not sure I have the time to go over all the details about how bad this hotel was. 
I will say this place was not clean Also the Wi-Fi was very important to me and no one understood how to how to access the Wi-Fi  had to figure it out on my own. Bottom line if I could have canceled this stay without losing my money, I would have stayed elsewhere

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: No staff after 10pm. Could not check in when I arrived. Lost my money

reviews.title: Great place
reviews.text: Great prices and good rooms.

reviews.title: This hotel was a complete scam I suggest don't book here they steal money with no show fee
reviews.positives: Nothing my rate is negative
reviews.negatives:
When I arrived the guy at the front desk told me that he couldn't do the check in because didn't have internet, it was 11:00 pm and I came from the airport from a trip abroad, so he suggested me to find another hotel because the internet could be back next day. I asked him to cancel my reservation to avoid a no show fee, he promised to do it, wrote my name and mobile and he will call me to confirm the cancelation.
He didn't call me and didn't cancel my reservation and the no show fee was charged for one night, it wasn't my fault and I had to pay for another hotel to stay.

reviews.title: Average
reviews.text: Property is very worn out. Key card didn’t always work and had to go to staff to fix it numerous times. Lots of pets and their activities around property. Breakfast is very limited

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: I booked through booking.com but upon arrival to the hotel I had to pay an additional price on the room I've already paid for... very upset.

reviews.title: Value for the dollar..
reviews.text: I was pleased with the room, cleanliness and the value. I did have some issues with the TV not being set up and then losing service on my last night.  I was also surprised to find out that they had a pet policy and found out that a 5:30 am + barking "alarm" would continue for about 2 hours ~ which may have been caused by unusally extreme cold weather and snow. Unplowed parking lots seemed to prevail at all the less expensive hotels.

reviews.title: Nobody is working the desk at night
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: They tried to say we were smoking and it was the ppl next door

reviews.title: Good spot
reviews.text: Nice clean quiet location

reviews.title: This stay was not a stay I left, given it’s the worst facility I’ve ever seen.
reviews.positives:
I didn’t like anything about the property. The clerk at the front desk was okay. The facility is very unsanitary. I’ve never seen such filth, even the remote was stick and nasty. The hotel reeked of all type of cigarette smells, and other smells I can’t explain.

It was dingy in the room, the website showed the room bright, that’s not how it was inside the room. The carpet was saturated with stains and looked like it hadn’t been cleaned in forever. The restroom was equally disgusting, with stains and some unknown substance on the sink.

The chairs in the room were filthy, and the bed was NOT sanitary. It had stains, crumbs, and the bedding was yellow. I wouldn’t recommend this hotel to anyone. This hotel needs an inspector to come through and revamp the whole hotel in relation to cleaning, renovation, and repairs. That was a truly grotesque experience and I left with my child that day. 

It was no way we were going to occupy that room.
reviews.negatives: I didn’t like this property regarding the filth, definitely overpriced, unsafe, and unsanitary.

reviews.title: Quick abs effective
reviews.text: The staff is great and the price is even better for what you get and the prime location

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Paid 300 for a room that wasn’t worth 300 NEVER AGAIN

reviews.title: Unexpected travel
reviews.text: I unexpectedly had to stay in Fairfield for meetings, at the last minute and most other places were already full or to far for my liking, so I stayed here. I wasn’t expecting much but was very surprised by the cleanliness and set up of the building. The staff was super friendly, and the patrons were all well behaved and quite as well. The rooms were comfy and spacious and clean. It’s also located in the center of literally everything which was super convenient. Was pleased with the experience and would stay again

reviews.title: Will never stay here again for sure and probably will never stay at the chain again .
reviews.negatives: The hotel is run down , needs a major update . The bed was broken and so uncomfortable . The paper thin walls let you hear the locals that were living there . They would yell scream and carry on and staff doing nothing to combat the noise . There was a vehicle that broken into when I was there also . Thieves took everything out of the inside of a pickup . Just not a good time . Not the best place .

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
The room was clean which was very much appreciated. We only spent one night so I didn’t bring my hair dryer because I always bring it and don’t need it at other motels and they didn’t have one. We asked at the desk and they didn’t have one (even though on the paper in the room it said to ask if you need one) so he went out in a severe thunderstorm to buy me one. We lost the signal to the tv for about an hour but not the lights thankfully. Anyway it had a kitchenette so no coffee maker in the room. The breakfast only had coffee, instant oatmeal and muffins so we didn’t bother we checked out and went to breakfast. 
Checking in the woman was not friendly at all and downright rude we he asked for hairdryer. However in the morning the lady was very friendly as well as the maintenance man. 
Overall it was an enjoyable stay.

reviews.title: Bad
reviews.positives: I don’t like it
reviews.negatives: I didn't like them all, I made a reservation with them and when I arrived at night they told me they didn't have a room and I had to sleep in my car on a cold night. Now my credit card has been charged

reviews.title: BAD SMELL
reviews.text: Room was ok. The fridge was left off and when I opened the door it made me  sick from the smell.  They tell you its non smoking but when you walk down halfway its smells like cigarettes and pot. The staff was nice and accommodating.

reviews.title: HIGHLY dissatisfied.
reviews.positives: Front desk lady was amazingly helpful and polite. That’s about all there is to like about this hotel. All other desk staff are nose down in their cell phones the entire time…
reviews.negatives:
Just dirty. Hotel is terribly outdated, misrepresented, and the rooms are old & dirty. The entire complex has a musky wet smell and terrible odor about it. Especially in the basement near the laundry room. Don’t even know how to explain that terrible smell. Carpets are terribly old all about the hotel and not to mention the popcorn ceilings. Found trash under furniture and in trash bins as if they weren’t cleaned. 

Just overall a waste of $$$. 

Random people smoking weed in parking lots with back doors propped open. A lot of “lurkers” in and around the parking lot. Definitely doesn’t feel like a safe hotel . 

Over all would NOT recommend this hotel for anyone much less a family traveling. There looks to be much better options across the street.

reviews.title: Value
reviews.text: It's a nice place to stay but the extended stay prices are outrageous. $590/week no one that's struggling can afford that. Its a nice place to stay in a convenient area. Close to work.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Added cleaning charge. Could be kept much nicer. Difficult entering and exiting building

reviews.title: Top 5
reviews.text: Very clean and quiet place. It’s one of my top five places to stay. The only problem is that they now have a deposit of $100 that makes it very difficult to stay there

reviews.negatives: My room was dirty and had red stains all over the sink and floor. I found a few dead bugs. It’s a bit awkward to get in and out of the property if you’re on the first floor.

reviews.title: My, how Extended Stay fell from grace!
reviews.positives: Nothing!
reviews.negatives: I booked through Priceline.com, or one of the travel booking sites. In doing so, I filtered my search based on accessibility, given that I am a senior citizen with bad knees and dietary requirements such that I packed all my meals for a three day stay. The coolers I used where big, packed with food, water and Ice. with this in mind I requested  Extended Stay with an elevator. The Fairfield Ohio location was one of the sites returned by the search engine. However, when I arrived, not only did the attendant tell me that there were no elevators (which was not a show-stopper per se), but I felt that the attendant deliberately misled me about the stair cases I'd have to negotiate to get to my room on the fist level. Another attendant reminded that person (who directed me up a flight of stairs, down a hallway, then down a really long flight of stairs to get to  my room), that I could park in the back of the facility and enter there to get to my room. Fine, I did so and was OK, until I got into my room. First the lighting was horrendous, and the toilet seat was not secure to the toilet. Second, the bedding was horrible, extra firm, so much so that I woke up the next morning with back pain. Very uncomfortable stay. I then informed the staff that my initial intent of staying three days would end with a one day stay. At check out, the front office staff themselves "checked-out", never returning to the office. This was maybe 10:30am, so I sat in the lobby for 15 - 20 minutes, finally having to call the corporate switchboard to check me out and email me my receipt (and to confirm my refund). Finally, although I usually check customer reviews on the Yelp platform before committing $$, I failed to do this vital procedure because I was in a rush upon leaving for the trip. When I did review the Yelp customer reviews it was no surprise that I was just another of a long list of dissatisfied customers.

reviews.title: Woohoo
reviews.text: It was cool

reviews.title: Super basic accommodations with few amenities.
reviews.positives: Location is great! Close to food and shopping but off the main road. Didn’t find any bugs in the room. Staff very helpful and pleasant. Hand soap provided, which is something I haven’t gotten at some other extended stays.
reviews.negatives: Didn’t realize there were no elevators until the last minute. Super outdated and worn decor and appliances. Have to ask the front desk for a coffee maker, which is standard in most hotel rooms; must ask for most anything “extra.” Requested plates, cups, and silverware—some of it was dirty upon receipt. Packets of dishwashing liquid were so small—maybe a couple of drops to wash dishes. No conditioner or shower gel, which I prefer over bar soap. Toilet seat was loose. Pull out couch mattress was dirty when pulled out and quite thin.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Friendly Staff stayed for over 30 days never had a problem.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
The rooms smelled like cats and cigarettes.
The fan in the bathroom did not work and the tv had no volume.

reviews.title: Very nice, friendly and clean
reviews.text: Amazing service, room was lovely and clean, will definitely stay again. The location is great, easy access to Fairfield or Cincinnati.

reviews.title: It was decent microwave didn’t work and the guy at the front wasn’t the nicest
reviews.positives: The room was ok and clean
reviews.negatives: The dishes and silverware was in the room like I thought you had to ask and go up there and get it yourself. The microwave didn’t work at all. The long-haired guy at the front was a little rude.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Love this place been here 2 months perfect for long stays

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Location was fine.  No protein.  Hot water was not sufficient enough to brew tea properly.
reviews.negatives: Had to go up a flight of stairs and then down again to get to my first floor room.  Room smelled of stale Cigarette smoke. There was a used washcloth hanging off the shower rod in the bathroom when I arrived.

reviews.title: Look elsewhere unless you're on a very tight budget
reviews.positives: I booked Extended Stay of America for a nearby convention. The prices are cheap for a suite with a kitchen and large refrigerator. The facility is close to restaurants. It's also close to Jungle Jim's, but far enough to avoid the horrible traffic.
reviews.negatives: Extended Stay of America is not really a hotel. It's more like a cheap apartment complex. I expected this; I've been to extended stays before. However, this one is definitely the worst I've ever booked, and the photos do not match the current state of the facility. The area around the "hotel" is rough and made me feel unsafe. There is no elevator to my room. The room left much to be desired and did not feel clean. I struggled to get a good night's sleep because the neighbors were loud and obnoxious. While the price was reasonable, there are better hotels nearby for about the same price.

reviews.title: Overall it was a great stay with the exception of the employee that was there when I arrived a little after 4:30.
reviews.positives: Very clean and close to some great restaurants
reviews.negatives: The boy that was working the desk was EXTREMELY rude!! Didn’t smile nor say hello or addressed me upon my arrival.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Staff was polite, location and size of rooms.
reviews.negatives:
The pillow and case had blood on it like someone had a nose bleed on it so the bedding  obviously hadn't been changed my daughter went got clean from desk but the bloody pillow should of been trashed when I worked at an ESA their policy was to throw something like that away. 
The floors and tub were dirty. When my daughter opened her sofa bed it still had dirty sheets inside of it. 
Curtains had holes all in it and my friend went to get a dish from front and of coursecit was not cleaned good. I booked my room for 2 nights because I was having outpatient surgery at a hospital close to there. I came back and tried to rest after surgery and the people above were still arguing and fighting slamming doors needless to say I basically wasted my money for the second night because I was just over that place by 4:00 in the afternoon and just came on back home so I could actually get some rest.
I came here because of rating on Booking but I don't see how because this place didn't match the ratings at all.

reviews.title: Change of company means changes for guests
reviews.positives: I've been staying at this hotel for a few years visiting my family in town.  It has changed owners.  The place is still clean.  Most of the regular staff is present and they do a great job.
reviews.negatives: The new company cut amenities including cable TV.  There are more noise complaints and problems with other guests.  These are all issues that were NEVER a concern when the hotel was Extended Stay America.

reviews.title: As a single night at an extended stay, it was a perfect, affordable accommodation. Many many thanks.
reviews.positives:
The night guy Jesse was awesome after my having arrived very late after hours, and the morning woman who checked me out was totally awesome and cool.
And where I parked happened to be right beneath my 3rd floor room so I could check on my rental car if necessary, so that was serendipitously sweet. :)
reviews.negatives: Maybe some kind of plan for world peace? What wasn't to like, except that I had to check out at check out time. ;)
